title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Sports Hall
questions.text: The sports hall floor has just been cleaned. Please do not enter until the green sign is displayed on the door. Basketball practice will begin as soon as the floor is dry.
questions.question: What does the notice mean?

options.A: Students must wait before using the hall.
options.B: Basketball practice has been moved outside.
options.C: The hall cannot be cleaned today.

questions.explanation: Students should wait until the green sign is shown.

questions.heading: Message from Jamie to Noor
questions.text: Noor, I’m still coming to the study group, but I need to take my sister home first. Please start without me and save the grammar exercises until I arrive.
questions.question: Why is Jamie texting Noor?

options.B: To say which part he hopes to do later.
options.A: To cancel the study group completely.
options.C: To ask Noor to take his sister home.

questions.explanation: Jamie asks them to save the grammar exercises until he arrives.

questions.heading: Science Room Models
questions.text: Please do not touch the volcano models on this table. They are being judged tomorrow morning. If a label has fallen off, tell the teacher instead of trying to replace it.
questions.question: What should students do?

options.C: Ask for help if something is wrong.
options.A: Repair the models before judging begins.
options.B: Move the models to another table.

questions.explanation: Students should tell the teacher if a label has fallen off.

questions.heading: From: Aunt Sara / Subject: The tickets
questions.text: I bought tickets for the afternoon show because the evening one was sold out. If that is too early for you, I can try to exchange them, but there may be an extra charge.
questions.question: What is Aunt Sara saying?

options.A: Changing the tickets might cost more money.
options.B: The evening show tickets were cheaper.
options.C: She forgot to buy any tickets.

questions.explanation: She can try to exchange the tickets, but it may cost extra.

questions.heading: Teenage First Aid Course
questions.text: Learn basic first aid skills in a one-day course at the community centre. You do not need experience, but you must be at least thirteen. Places are limited to twenty students.
questions.question: Who can join the course?

options.B: Teenagers of the correct age who book early.
options.A: Only students with first aid experience.
options.C: Any child under the age of thirteen.

questions.explanation: Students must be at least thirteen, and places are limited.
